Dr. Manisha expressed a keen interest in the project and conveyed her belief in its feasibility.

 Additionally, we reached out to Dr. Dulange, a distinguished authority in Ayurvedic medicine, who also provided us with a favorable assessment. Both experts highlighted a common concern, namely, the issue of elevated expenses. Consequently, we are diligen
tly working to enhance cost-effectiveness to ensure the sustained loyalty of our clientele.

Product Line
Instructions for using the application are as follows:

1. Initiate the setup process by creating your user profile.
2. Respond to a set of fundamental questions aimed at determining your specific skin and hair type.
3. Once the initial setup is complete, the application is fully operational.

The application offers a range of features, including:

- AI-Based Filters: These intelligent filters assist you in selecting the most suitable style for your unique preferences.
- ChatBot Sys

tem: Our responsive ChatBot is designed to address your inquiries promptly and effectively.
- Weekly Follow-Up Calls: Periodic calls are scheduled to monitor your progress and resolve any concerns or challenges you may encounter.
- A Team of Expert Professionals: Our team consists of skilled experts, including Cosmetologists, Dermatologists, Microbiologists, and Psychologists, all readily available to assist you.
- Premium User Benefits: For our premium users, we provide thoroughly tested and pe

rsonally tailored product recommendations, along with customized guidance and dietary plans. Additionally, premium users can avail themselves of complimentary consultations with our medical professionals, subject to time limitations.

ll further ensure the integrity and excellence of our product range.
Distinguishing ourselves from our competitors is essential to elucidate the superior quality of our services. In addition, considering paid marketing as an option further reinforces our commitment to showcasing our unique value proposition.
